highlights: Lead DevOps and platform engineering for Pixar, Hyundai, and L&T client workloads.

Implemented GitOps workflows with ArgoCD and Helm across multi-cluster Kubernetes environments.

Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and ArgoCD.
Managed Kubernetes clusters (EKS/GKE) and Terraform-based IaC for cloud provisioning.
Automated infrastructure observability with Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack.
Reduced deployment lead time by 40% through pipeline optimisation and environment standardisation.
Developed automated test frameworks for REST APIs and microservices using Python and pytest.
Integrated test suites into CI pipelines, improving release confidence and velocity.
Collaborated with DevOps teams to shift-left quality practices across the SDLC.
Automated regression testing for TIBCO middleware products using Java and Selenium.
Designed and executed performance and load testing strategies.
Mentored junior QA engineers and maintained test documentation.
